allow: Bash(ssh vynx@vynx-pi.local "which cargo 2>/dev/null || \(curl --proto ''=https'' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y 2>&1 | tail -5\)")
Bash(ssh vynx@vynx-pi.local "ls ~/.cargo/bin/cargo 2>/dev/null && echo RUST_INSTALLED || echo NOT_YET")
Bash(ssh vynx@vynx-pi.local 'source ""$HOME/.cargo/env"" && cd /tmp/rust-fetch-build && cargo build --release 2>&1 | tail -10')
Bash(ssh vynx@vynx-pi.local "ls -la /tmp/rust-fetch-build/target/release/rust-fetch 2>/dev/null && echo BUILD_DONE || echo STILL_BUILDING")
Bash(ssh vynx@vynx-pi.local "sudo cp /tmp/rust-fetch-build/target/release/rust-fetch /usr/local/bin/rust-fetch && rust-fetch --help 2>&1 | grep proxy")
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 vynx@vynx-pi.local 'sudo cp /tmp/rust-fetch-build/target/release/rust-fetch /usr/local/bin/rust-fetch && rust-fetch --help 2>&1 | grep -i proxy')

Bash(ssh vynx@vynx-pi.local 'sudo systemctl stop rpi-proxy 2>/dev/null; sudo pm2 stop rpi-proxy 2>/dev/null; sudo cp /tmp/rust-fetch-build/target/release/rust-fetch /usr/local/bin/rust-fetch && echo ""REPLACED"" && rust-fetch --help 2>&1 | grep -i proxy')

Bash(ssh vynx@vynx-pi.local 'sudo sed -i ""/^Environment=PORT/a Environment=PROXY_SOCKS5_URL=socks5://250119xUvJ4-resi-any:z8mSICKOCGarEPw@proxy-jet.io:2020"" /etc/systemd/system/rpi-proxy.service && sudo systemctl daemon-reload && sudo systemctl start rpi-proxy && sleep 2 && sudo systemctl status rpi-proxy | head -8')
Bash(ssh vynx@vynx-pi.local 'cd ~/rpi-proxy && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -5; sudo systemctl restart rpi-proxy && sleep 2 && sudo systemctl status rpi-proxy | head -5')
Bash(ssh vynx@vynx-pi.local 'export NVM_DIR=""$HOME/.nvm"" && source ""$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"" && cd ~/rpi-proxy && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -5')
Bash(ssh vynx@vynx-pi.local 'export NVM_DIR=""$HOME/.nvm"" && source ""$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"" && cd ~/rpi-proxy && npx tsc 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo ""BUILD OK""')
Bash(ssh vynx@vynx-pi.local 'sudo systemctl restart rpi-proxy && sleep 2 && sudo systemctl status rpi-proxy | head -5')
Bash(ssh vynx@vynx-pi.local 'sudo journalctl -u rpi-proxy --since ""1 min ago"" --no-pager 2>/dev/null | tail -30')
Bash(ssh vynx@vynx-pi.local 'grep ""PROXY_SOCKS5"" ~/rpi-proxy/dist/routes/dlhd.js 2>/dev/null || grep ""PROXY_SOCKS5"" ~/rpi-proxy/server.js 2>/dev/null || echo ""NOT FOUND IN COMPILED JS""')
Bash(ssh vynx@vynx-pi.local 'export NVM_DIR=""$HOME/.nvm"" && source ""$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"" && cd ~/rpi-proxy && ls node_modules/.bin/tsc 2>/dev/null && node_modules/.bin/tsc 2>&1 | tail -10')

Bash(ssh vynx@vynx-pi.local 'export NVM_DIR=""$HOME/.nvm"" && source ""$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"" && cd ~/rpi-proxy && chmod +x node_modules/.bin/tsc && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc 2>&1 | tail -10 && echo ""BUILD OK""')
Bash(ssh vynx@vynx-pi.local 'sudo journalctl -u rpi-proxy --since """"15 sec ago"""" --no-pager | grep -i """"dlhd\\|key\\|whitelist\\|proxy"""" | head -20')
Bash(ssh vynx@vynx-pi.local 'sudo journalctl -u rpi-proxy --since ""2 min ago"" --no-pager | grep -i ""whitelist\\|fake\\|recaptcha"" | head -20')
Bash(ssh vynx@vynx-pi.local 'sudo journalctl -u rpi-proxy --since ""5 min ago"" --no-pager | grep -i ""action\\|recaptcha\\|puppeteer\\|verify\\|whitelist"" | tail -20')
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 vynx@vynx-pi.local 'sudo journalctl -u rpi-proxy -n 100 --no-pager | grep -i ""action\\|recaptcha\\|puppeteer\\|verify\\|whitelist\\|mismatch"" | tail -20')
